creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #3)
Adding "--verbose" to CONFIGURE_ARGS is preferable as I alluded to in comment #1. It prints out a useful summary, passes -DCMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE=1 once the bootstrapping is complete, and avoids numerous spammy 'Dependencies file "foo" is newer than depends file "bar"' lines.
